Sound Palette Options

Click to preview - Performance column optimized for rapid triggering

Sound Current A: Percussive B: Melodic C: Hybrid PERF: Optimized
Core Sounds (Frequent)
Collapse BEAT Sine beep Tuned tom 1 voice Marimba chord 3 voices Pop + bass 2 voices Tight punch 1 voice, 50ms
Collapse VIBE Sine beep Shaker 1 voice Glass bells 3 voices Whoosh + chime 2 voices Bright tick 1 voice, 40ms
Collapse MELODY Sine beep Wood block 1 voice Harp chord 4 voices Pluck + sparkle 2 voices Clean pluck 1 voice, 60ms
Combo (2x-5x) Arpeggio Drum fill 5 voices Chime scale 5 voices Impact + sparkle 5 voices Rising blip 3 voices, staggered
Land Membrane Soft kick 1 voice Bass pluck 1 voice Thump + click 2 voices Sub thud 1 voice, 30ms
Rotate High beep Click 1 voice Grace note 1 voice Whoosh 1 voice Micro tick 1 voice, 15ms
Move L/R Quiet beep Tap 1 voice Blip 1 voice Slide 1 voice Silent tick 1 voice, 10ms
Drop Bass thump Punchy kick 1 voice Deep bass 2 voices Impact + rumble 2 voices Quick slam 1 voice, 80ms
Big Events (Less Frequent)
Big Cluster 5+ Same Cymbal swell 1 voice Orchestral stab 4 voices Reverse burst 3 voices Power hit 2 voices, 100ms
Massive 7+ Same Crash + roll 5 voices Choir + bells 5 voices Epic shimmer 6 voices Big impact 2 voices, 150ms
Special Tiles (Rare)
WILD None Metal shimmer Magic sparkle Glitch stutter Quick shimmer 1 voice
BOMB None Explosion Synth boom Distorted hit Tight boom 2 voices
FREEZE None Ice crack Frozen chime Crystal shatter Quick ice 1 voice
SHUFFLE None Card shuffle Whoosh swirl Glitch scramble Quick swipe 1 voice
DOUBLE 2x None Power ding Coin collect Level-up Quick ding 1 voice
SOCIAL None Jackpot bells Fanfare Gold shower Reward chime 2 voices
Danger & Game State
Danger None Heartbeat Low drone Alarm pulse Warning pulse 1 voice
Game Over None Descending Sad phrase Glitch fade Quick end 2 voices

Performance Column Features

  • Single voice - One oscillator per sound, no chords
  • Fast release - 10-80ms decay, no voice overlap on rapid triggers
  • Voice limiting - Auto-cuts previous sound when retriggered
  • Distinct per type - BEAT/VIBE/MELODY still sound different
  • C minor tuned - Still harmonizes with loops

Recommendation

Use PERF column for all frequent sounds (collapse, move, rotate, land). Use A/B/C for rare events (BOMB, SOCIAL, game over) where richness matters more than performance.
